atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constant pain in his left shoulder and left elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started approximately five months ago due to a fall.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant and quite bad at times.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty lifting more than 15-20 pounds due to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports stopping his two-day-a-week gym routine for the past one to two weeks due to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports walking approximately 30 minutes daily with his wife.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician denies any numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician denies any use of pain medications or ice.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has iced the area somewhat.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses the patient with impingement syndrome of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes the fall likely contributed to the current symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes no signs of swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans two sessions per week of physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders monitoring of the patient's response to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects a cortisone injection may be needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue icing the shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to rest as much as possible.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a referral for physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders the patient to call or email if symptoms worsen or do not improve.
